build.buildCommand: python -c "import sys; from pathlib import Path; r=Path('orb_live'); miss=[f for f in ('live_gate.json','breakout_gbm.pkl','symbol_breakout_profiles.json') if not (r/f).is_file()]; print('orb_live missing:', miss) if miss else print('orb_live bundle ok'); sys.exit(1 if miss else 0)"
